content.full_text:
Telephone Call from Tony Kline 10-21-75

MEMO TO: File

FROM: Ken Finney

SUBJECT: Chapter 7, Reporting Obligations

Mr. Kline explained that the Governor often invites certain legislators to lunch and pays for the cost of the lunch from a special contingency fund. Mr. Kline wondered whether the cost of the lunch would be a gift to the legislators who attend.

I indicated that I thought the lunches would be gifts but informed him that the threshold for a reporting obligation with respect to a gift is $25.00, and therefore before the legislators would have to report the lunches, the value of the meals would have to exceed $25.00 during a reporting period.

KF:gp
